done.openChatNoChannel: No chat app configured — add Telegram, Zalo, or Lark in setup.
done.dashboardHelp: Dashboard needs Gateway running + auth. Enchante opens http://127.0.0.1:18789 with #token= when gateway.auth.token is a plain string in config. If you see unauthorized or device_token_mismatch, paste the token from WSL: openclaw config get gateway.auth.token — see docs.openclaw.ai/web/dashboard
done.dashboardGatewayStopped: [dashboard] Gateway is not running. Start Gateway (or wait until it is Running), then open the dashboard again.
done.emailBundledReady: The app configured OpenClaw so the assistant can send mail via the bundled skill — no commands for you.
done.emailBundledNeedEnv: Finish setup: enable the Email skill, enter your mailbox on the Config step (app password for Gmail), save, then try again.
done.emailPasswordWhereDoneScreen: No password field on this screen. Enter it on the wizard Skills step: check Email, then fill Email address and Password (Gmail: App Password). To change later, run setup again or edit ~/.config/imap-smtp-email/.env in WSL.
done.emailTestGmailAppPassword: Gmail needs an App password (not your regular password) when 2-Step Verification is on. Create one under Google Account → Security → App passwords, paste it into the App password field on the Config step, tap “Apply email & App Password to OpenClaw”, then send the test again. Help: https://support.google.com/mail/?p=InvalidSecondFactor
done.zaloPairingSectionHint: If Zalo still asks for a code: refresh the list below, copy the code shown in Zalo into the field, and approve. You can do this anytime while Gateway is running.

uninstall.title: Uninstall OpenClaw
uninstall.desc: This will remove the OpenClaw package. This action cannot be undone.

backupRestore.restoreDesc: Restore settings from a backup file. Existing settings will be overwritten.

providerSwitch.title: Change AI Model
providerSwitch.ollamaInfo: See the checklist below for disk, RAM, and WSL on Windows. Keep `ollama serve` running for local models.

zaloPairing.title: Zalo pairing
zaloPairing.intro: When you message the bot on Zalo, it replies with “OpenClaw: access not configured” and a line like “Pairing code: ABCD1234”. That code can change each time you ask — copy the latest code from Zalo and approve it here so the bot can talk to you.
zaloPairing.codeHint: Paste only the code (e.g. C5VMZFXE). If you message the bot again, use the new code shown in Zalo.
zaloPairing.approved: Pairing approved. Try messaging the bot on Zalo again.
zaloPairing.invalidCode: Enter a valid code (letters, numbers, dashes).
zaloPairing.optionalNote: Approving the code is optional before you leave this step — you can tap Next and finish pairing on the last screen (or later) while Gateway runs.
zaloPairing.multipleCodes: {{count}} codes found in the output — the highlighted one is usually the latest.

logViewer.waitingChannels: No messaging channel lines yet (Zalo, Telegram, Lark…).
logViewer.copyActiveTabHint: Copy only the log from the tab you are viewing
